purpose: Hand-checked candidate bridges from kernel-v0 (54 Explicated profile-1 concepts) and molecules-v0 (54 molecules) into the onto-sumo tier. ANNOTATION-layer categorial correspondences, NOT identity claims: SUMO is a first-order upper ontology with its own axiomatization; kernel-v0 concepts are NSM explications. The correspondence is 'this NSM concept maps to this SUMO class/relation/attribute', with per-link confidence and caveat. Nothing here is endorsed; nothing enters the mapper.
method: manual review by the extracting agent (2026-07-07) against pinned onto-sumo records (SUMO @ ceb2954). Only confident links listed.

alignments.note: kernel-v0:event (gufo:Event) <-> SUMO Process (a Physical that happens in time; 'Intuitively the class of things that happen'). The clearest cross-ontology anchor alongside BFO process.
kernel-v0:part_of <-> SUMO part (a PartialOrderingRelation over Objects). SUMO properPart (urn:onto-sumo:properPart) is the irreflexive form; kernel-v0's 'X is a part of Y' is closest to part.
kernel-v0:has_part is the converse of SUMO part; SUMO has no separate has-part predicate, it is expressed by argument order.

kernel-v0:cause ('X happens; because X happens, Y happens after') <-> SUMO causes (an AsymmetricRelation between Processes). SUMO also carries causesSubclass / causesProposition (urn:onto-sumo:causesProposition) for finer typing.

kernel-v0:believe (X thinks 'it is true') <-> SUMO believes, a PropositionalAttitude subrelation of inScopeOfInterest. Caveat: SUMO believes relates an Agent to a Formula; the NSM version relates a someone to a something.
kernel-v0:give (X gives Y to someone) <-> SUMO Giving, a subclass of ChangeOfPossession. The event/process reading aligns; NSM foregrounds the pre/post ability-to-do.
kernel-v0:make (because X did something, there is this something) <-> SUMO Making (Creation + IntentionalProcess).
kernel-v0:promise (the speech act) <-> SUMO Committing (a LinguisticCommunication). SUMO also has Promise as an Obligation subAttribute (urn:onto-sumo:Promise) for the resulting deontic state.
kernel-v0:lie is a Stating (LinguisticCommunication) with a falsity + intent-to-deceive condition SUMO does not lexicalize as a class; low-confidence.
The emotion kernel concepts correspond to SUMO EmotionalState (a StateOfMind attribute). SUMO models these as Attributes of an Agent; NSM models them as think-like-this templates.
Human-made object molecules <-> SUMO Artifact (a subclass of Object/CorpuscularObject).
Non-artifact material molecules <-> SUMO SelfConnectedObject / CorpuscularObject (Object subclasses). water/fire are Substance-like; low precision at this granularity.
Animal molecules <-> SUMO Animal (Organism subclass). SUMO Animal is partitioned (Vertebrate/Invertebrate), so finer species mapping is available.
Person molecules <-> SUMO Human (Hominid + CognitiveAgent; partitioned by age/sex, giving man/woman/child directly).
Activity molecules <-> SUMO BodyMotion (Motion subclass) or specific processes (Walking/Running under Ambulating, Eating under Ingesting, Sleeping under PsychologicalProcess).

notes: SUMO's richest asset for this programme is its 48 <=> definitional axioms (data/onto-sumo term records' definitionalAxiomRefs) and its 746 relation declarations with domain/range typing — a valency signal parallel to profile-1. Unlike OBO genus-differentia, SUMO definitions are full first-order formulae, so they are NOT clean structured-explication upgrade candidates (they would need semantic translation the programme forbids at bulk scale); recorded as such.
